message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracking data for audit batches and scheduler/channel fixes

Updates the local beads issue tracker with status changes from recent
audit and bug-fix work, including closure of completed audit beads and
new entries for the scheduler stale-entry and channel fault-evidence
fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
